entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `path` TEXT NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `category` TEXT NOT NULL, `duration` INTEGER NOT NULL, `resolution` TEXT NOT NULL, `size` INTEGER NOT NULL, `thumbnailPath` TEXT, `checksum` TEXT, `dateAdded` INTEGER NOT NULL, `isCorrupt` INTEGER NOT NULL, `errorMessage` TEXT)

indices.name: index_videos_path
indices.createSql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_videos_path` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`path`)

indices.name: index_videos_category_dateAdded
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_videos_category_dateAdded` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`category`, `dateAdded`)

indices.name: index_videos_isCorrupt
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_videos_isCorrupt` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`isCorrupt`)

indices.name: index_videos_name
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_videos_name` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`name`)

entities.createSql: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` USING FTS4(`name` TEXT NOT NULL, `category` TEXT NOT NULL, `path` TEXT NOT NULL, content=`videos`)
contentSyncTriggers: CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_videos_fts_BEFORE_UPDATE BEFORE UPDATE ON `videos` BEGIN DELETE FROM `videos_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END
CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_videos_fts_BEFORE_DELETE BEFORE DELETE ON `videos` BEGIN DELETE FROM `videos_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_videos_fts_AFTER_UPDATE AFTER UPDATE ON `videos` BEGIN INSERT INTO `videos_fts`(`docid`, `name`, `category`, `path`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`name`, NEW.`category`, NEW.`path`); END

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_videos_fts_AFTER_INSERT AFTER INSERT ON `videos` BEGIN INSERT INTO `videos_fts`(`docid`, `name`, `category`, `path`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`name`, NEW.`category`, NEW.`path`); END

setupQueries: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS room_master_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,identity_hash TEXT)
